task: The dual-wg-vpxs appears to have been successful. Merge and push. New task - When performing /submit-score and then choosing the grind-type, then the optional 'table-name' param, a list of options appear. These should represent what options (tables) are available as per the grind-type selected. Currently, all grind tables are being shown.
final_instruction: Remember to think step-by-step before answering.
